summary: Validated oracle_testdata guarded DML path with a rollback-only zero-row UPDATE smoke against PGNBILL.M_RBI_BILLING_ITEM; JDBC execution succeeded, affected_rows=0, committed=false.
derived_updates: Configured DB user resolves as schema owner PGNBILL, so direct test-data DML can be attempted through guarded plans when needed.
DML smoke plan `_smoke.rollback-update-noop.json` proves the injection runner can connect and execute rollback-mode DML without changing data.
Persistent injection remains gated by saved plan, explicit --apply --commit, plan confirmation token, TESTDATA_DML_COMMIT, schema allowlist, and max affected rows.
